# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: enable-envoy-admin
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels: {}
  configPatches:
    - applyTo: HTTP_FILTER
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
        listener:
          name: istio-proxy
          filterChain:
            filter:
              name: envoy-access-loggers
      patch:
        operation: INSERT_BEFORE
        value:
          name: envoy-admin
          config:
            stat_prefix: envoy.admin
            access_log_path: "/dev/stdout"
            address:
              socket_address:
                protocol: TCP
                address: 0.0.0.0
                port_value: 15000
    - applyTo: HTTP_ROUTE
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
        routeConfiguration:
          name: istio-default
      patch:
        operation: ADD
        value:
          route:
            - match:
                prefix: "/config_dump"
              route:
                destination:
                  port:
                    number: 15000
            - match:
                prefix: "/stats"
              route:
                destination:
                  port:
                    number: 15000
            - match:
                prefix: "/clusters"
              route:
                destination:
                  port:
                    number: 15000
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-admin-traffic
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels: {}
  mtls:
    mode: DISABLE
